name: Parking, Security & Hazard Sign Range
shortDescription: No parking, CCTV, danger, electrical and general hazard signage for site perimeters.
longDescription: General facility signage beyond fire safety — no parking discs, CCTV-in-operation notices, danger/hazard warning triangles, no smoking, high-voltage electrical warnings and floor numbering — printed on the same durable, self-adhesive material as the fire safety range, for consistent signage across an entire site.

images.alt: Parking, Security & Hazard Sign Range supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Covers
specs.value: No parking, CCTV notice, danger triangle, no smoking, high-voltage warning, floor number
